tools.name: sicore_calculate_retention
tools.description: Compute the Ganancias retention amount for a single payment per RG 830/00. Honors monthly accumulator + already-retained credit. Returns 0 when supplier is exento or accumulated is below mínimo.

tools.name: sicore_calculate_retention_stream
tools.description: Walk a chronological stream of payments to ONE supplier in ONE month, returning per-payment retentions with the accumulator advancing.

tools.name: sicore_build_ddjj
tools.description: Aggregate retention results into a monthly SICORE DDJJ with per-category and per-supplier breakdowns. Pure aggregation, does NOT submit.

tools.name: sicore_submit_ddjj
tools.description: Submit an assembled SICORE DDJJ to AFIP/ARCA. Throws SicoreUnconfiguredError unless the host wired a real adapter. Files a tax return — confirmation gate required.
